message:
feat(query): Add eager loading infrastructure for relationships

Implement eager loading support for fetching related objects with queries:

crates/sqlmodel-query/src/eager.rs (new):
- EagerLoader<T> builder for configuring relationship loading
- IncludePath for specifying nested relationship paths
- Support for multi-level relationship traversal
- Methods: include(), include_nested(), all()
- Designed for SQL JOIN-based fetching

Usage:
```rust
let heroes = select!(Hero)
    .eager(EagerLoader::new().include("team"))
    .all_eager(&conn)
    .await?;
```

crates/sqlmodel-query/src/lib.rs:
- Add pub mod eager; export

crates/sqlmodel-query/src/select.rs:
- Wire eager loader integration into select queries

crates/sqlmodel-session/src/lib.rs:
- Minor adjustments for eager loading support

crates/sqlmodel-core:
- lib.rs and relationship.rs adjustments for eager loading types

This provides the foundation for N+1 query prevention by allowing
relationship data to be fetched in the initial query via JOINs
rather than separate queries per object.

Also update Cargo.lock and sync beads issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
